title: [FIRTOOL] Verification layers are not included in filelist.f
body:
Background: We are bumping our firtool version. See https://github.com/chipsalliance/t1/pull/734

# Description

After the bumping, our workflow breaks as if all `$stop` statements are discarded. It seems recently how firtool generates verilog code has drastically changed.

We observe that `layers_TestBench_Verification.sv` and such are NOT included in `filelist.f`. These files contains `bind` statements to actually bind verification modules, thus it effectively throw out all code in verification layers. This is the root cause of the issue.

Any ideas on how to recover the previous behavior?

firtool version after bumping: 1.81.1

# Addtional Context

# Reproduce

Clone [dependencies-bumping-2024-08-21](https://github.com/chipsalliance/t1/tree/dependencies-bumping-2024-08-21)

Run `nix build -L .#t1.blastoise.ip.verilator-emu-rtl -o result-rtl`

The `result-rtl` directory will contains generated SystemVerilog code and filelist.f
